version_pin_rationale: fontconfig-config 2.13.1-4.2ubuntu5 (Architecture: all) ships /etc/fonts/fonts.conf and the 38 /etc/fonts/conf.avail/*.conf defaults. THIS WAS THE HIDDEN DE0-G DEP CALLED OUT BY THE DE0-G REPORT — libfontconfig.so.1's FcInit() reads /etc/fonts/fonts.conf at runtime; without it `fc-list` returns empty and Hyprland/sway/foot render zero glyphs. DE0-G's fontconfig.json catalog ships ONLY the libs + fc-cache binary; this catalog provides the missing /etc/ surface. expected_files[] gates a 9-file subset (the 38 conf.avail files all get extracted under the store dir by dpkg-deb -x but only 9 gate the test). dependency_closure[] reflects the .deb's Depends: chain via the umbrella package fonts-dejavu-core.
